chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 1441 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Mr. Shehriyar Imdad Awan, AAG. ***************** On 07.12.2023 following order was passed. “ No one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the order sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous several dates and the matter has not been effectively pursued over the protracted period. Be that as it may, by way of indulgence, the matter is adjourned, but with caution that if representation on behalf of the petitioner is not forthcoming on the next date, the petition would liable to be dismissed”. After the said order no efforts have been taken by the petitioner or his counsel to proceed with the matter even today none appeared nor any intimation received which reflects that they have lost interest in the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
